source_jobs.title: Software Engineer, Frontend
source_jobs.description:
Profound is the marketing platform for the AI era. As people increasingly turn to ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini to decide what to buy, we give brands the intelligence to see how AI represents them and the Agents to act on it. Today, ~13% of the Fortune 500, plus companies like Ramp, Figma, Chime, Calendly, and DocuSign, use Profound to turn AI Search from a black box into a measurable growth channel.

Backed by Lightspeed, Sequoia, Kleiner Perkins, and Khosla Ventures at a $1B valuation, we're a lean, fast-moving team across NYC, SF, Buenos Aires, and London, shipping at a relentless pace and defining a new category at the biggest shift in marketing in 25 years. If you want to do the best work of your career at the frontier of AI, come build it with us.

As a Frontend Engineer, you will play a key role in shaping high-performance, visually stunning React applications that power the future of AI-driven marketing experiences.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Build and refine sleek, high-quality user interfaces from low-fidelity wireframes

 - Implement god-like CSS to create exceptional, pixel-perfect experiences

 - Optimize front-end performance to ensure seamless interactions

 - Work closely with design and engineering to bring ideas to life with precision and speed

 - Contribute to our product’s core architecture and front-end best practices




WHO YOU ARE

 - Deep expertise in React, Next.js, and TypeScript, with strong knowledge of state management and performance optimization

 - Proven experience architecting and scaling complex Next.js applications (App Router, SSR, SSG, ISR)

 - Strong command of Tailwind CSS, SASS, or SCSS, delivering polished, pixel-perfect UIs
   Experience with data-fetching libraries like React Query (or similar)

 - Skilled in building smooth, engaging interfaces with advanced CSS animations, transitions, and layout techniques

 - Strong understanding of caching strategies and CDN integrations for global performance at scale

 - Experience with React Server Components in production environments

 - Familiar with internationalization and localization strategies in Next.js applications

 - Comfortable operating in a fast-paced startup environment with rapid iteration cycles

 - A strong design eye and portfolio demonstrating high-quality front-end work


NICE TO HAVE (OPTIONAL):

 - Experience with GSAP for advanced animations

 - Experience with Three.js, React Three Fiber (R3F), or immersive 3D experiences




LOCATION

This is an on-site role in our NYC, SF, or Buenos Aires office, designed for builders who thrive on speed, iteration, and meaningful impact. We are happy to support visa sponsorship for qualified international candidates.

For this role, the expected base salary range is $140,000 to $260,000 (NYC and SF). Comp may vary by location. Profound’s total compensation package is designed to be competitive and includes base salary, equity, and a full range of benefits and perks. Final compensation will depend on factors such as your skills, experience, qualifications, and location, and will be determined during the interview process. Our recruiting team will share more details about the full compensation package and benefits as you move through hiring.

As a GTM Engineer focused on Pre-Sales and Outbound, you will build the infrastructure that powers every stage of our revenue pipeline. Part lead intelligence system and part outbound engine, you will capture every signal a prospect sends, qualify leads with precision, and make sure the right opportunity reaches the right rep at the right time. Your work will directly shape how our Sales function scales.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Scope and map every path a prospect can take into Profound’s funnel, then build systems that capture, qualify, and route each one without manual intervention

 - Build intent scoring models that rank leads by genuine buying signal rather than raw activity volume, so reps spend their time on the accounts most likely to convert

 - Design automated routing logic across territory, company size, and rep capacity, handling edge cases cleanly so the system holds up on the hard days, not just the easy ones

 - Produce rep-ready outputs directly from the scoring pipeline, so reps start their day dialing rather than cleaning spreadsheets

 - Build outbound sequence automation that generates personalized messaging at scale, drawing on firmographic and behavioral data

 - Own the full technical stack across the pipeline, from data ingestion and enrichment through scoring, routing, and delivery, and design schemas that make the whole system maintainable as it grows

 - Experiment relentlessly with new platforms, APIs, and AI-native tools, staying ahead of what is possible in the ecosystem




WHO YOU ARE

 - High-agency builder who can scope a messy, multi-source data problem, design a system to solve it, and ship something a sales team will actually trust and use

 - Technically fluent in Python or JavaScript, comfortable building automated pipelines, integrating APIs, and working across the full data stack

 - AI-native thinker who defaults to automation and experiments regularly with agents, MCP, and workflow frameworks

 - Pragmatic about build versus buy, knowing when to assemble from existing tools rather than build from scratch

 - Familiar with tools like Clay, Orum, Apollo, PhantomBuster, n8n, or similar sales and automation platforms

 - Experience with GTM workflows such as sales operations, revenue operations, or a technical role inside a sales organization

 - You have spent meaningful time inside a revenue organization and built things that people on the floor actually relied on, not as an observer but as a practitioner

 - Systems thinker who considers edge cases and failure modes from the start, not as an afterthought

 - Comfortable operating in ambiguity and structuring your own roadmap
